name: skill-dev-toolkit
description: Self-contained toolkit to author Claude Agent Skills — create, score, refactor, tune, dogfood.

interface.shortDescription: Author, score, and refine Claude Agent Skills end-to-end
interface.longDescription: A self-contained toolkit for building high-quality Agent Skills: skill-creator-advance scaffolds or redesigns a skill, skill-judge scores it on an 8-dimension rubric, dogfood-skill-testing runs a blind behavioral test of whether it fires and meets its contract, skill-refactor cuts tokens while preserving behavior, and skill-tuning runs blind output A/B to tune voice and quality. Use it to take a skill from idea to ship.
defaultPrompt: Help me build a new Claude Agent Skill.
Score this SKILL.md and tell me where it's weak.
Dogfood this skill — will it fire when expected without over-firing?
